summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MCP'Arsonist AI penetration testing application. All backend APIs are fully functional (100% success rate) and frontend UI works perfectly with excellent integration. Burp Suite MCP integration gracefully handles disconnected state as expected.

design_issues.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent components

passed_tests: Backend API health endpoints (root, health) - 100% success
Session management (create, list, get, delete, status update) - all operations working
Findings management (create, list, filter, delete) - fixed ObjectId serialization issue
Chat functionality with AI integration - EMERGENT_LLM_KEY working correctly
Proxy history management - full CRUD operations working
Dashboard stats generation - real-time data display
Autonomous hunting (start/stop with proper request body) - fixed and working
Report generation and export - comprehensive reports generated
Burp MCP status endpoint - correctly shows disconnected state
Interceptor status endpoint - returns proper status structure
Hunt API with strategy parameter - validates session existence
Frontend navigation between all pages (Dashboard, Sessions, Interceptor, Settings)
Session creation dialog with form validation
Hunt authorization dialog with 3 modes (passive, active_safe, active_full)
Burp connection warning display when disconnected
Interceptor toggle functionality with proper error handling
WebSocket connection fallback to polling when WS fails
Responsive UI design with terminal-style theme
